title: medicago littoralis subsp. inermis
intro: Medicago littoralis subsp. inermis, also known as the spineless or thornless Medicago, is a subspecies of the Medicago littoralis plant, a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Medicago littoralis subsp. inermis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Medicago littoralis subsp. inermis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
